meta.titleWW: Raqoon VPN — Your fast access to the free internet
meta.descriptionWW: Forget about blocks with Raqoon VPN. Smart protocols, instant connection, and total anonymity without extra data.
meta.ogTitleWW: Raqoon VPN — Internet without borders or censorship
meta.ogDescriptionWW: The VPN that actually works. Plans from $9.99/month, Russian servers, and honest No-Logs. Connect in 1 minute!
meta.downloadTitleWW: Download Raqoon VPN — Total anonymity without registration
meta.downloadDescriptionWW: Try it 3 days for free. No credit card, no email, no tracking. Just download and use.
meta.downloadOgTitleWW: Raqoon — Your reliable access to the web
meta.downloadOgDescriptionWW: Download Raqoon VPN: secure your traffic with one tap. We don’t collect data — we protect privacy.
meta.aboutDescriptionWW: Qat Bilişim ve Yazılım Teknolojileri Ltd. Şti. develops Raqoon VPN. Office in Ankara, Türkiye. Support: help@raqoon.app.
meta.privacyDescriptionWW: Raqoon VPN Privacy Policy: no activity logs; limited technical data for VPN and subscriptions; billing via App Store, Google Play, and AppGallery; raqoon.app cookies and web analytics are separate from the VPN; email and support portal; delete your account in the app.
meta.termsDescriptionWW: Raqoon VPN Terms of Use: official app; third-party VPN clients only if your plan or support materials allow; subscriptions via App Store, Google Play, and AppGallery; acceptable use and Fair Use; delete your account in the app—cancel store billing separately; Turkish law; contact support first for disputes.
meta.contactDescriptionWW: Contact Raqoon support: billing, access, technical issues. Email: help@raqoon.app.
meta.refundDescriptionWW: Raqoon VPN refunds: use App Store, Google Play, or AppGallery tools for purchases in those stores—Raqoon cannot refund store-processed payments; cancel before trial renewal per store rules; non–App Store purchases depend on channel and law; help@raqoon.app for tech issues, not a substitute for Apple/Google/Huawei refund flows.
meta.referralDescriptionWW: Invite friends, share your promo code, and earn bonus days when they subscribe.
meta.referralOgTitleWW: Raqoon referral — bonus days for invites
meta.referralOgDescriptionWW: Get a promo code in the bot or app, share it with friends, and receive up to 30 bonus days.
meta.turkiyeDescriptionWW: Raqoon VPN is not available to users in or connecting from Türkiye. We hope this will change in the future.
meta.turkiyeOgTitleWW: Raqoon is not available in Türkiye right now
meta.turkiyeOgDescriptionWW: We’re sorry — the service cannot be offered in Türkiye at the moment. We hope to welcome you back one day.

meta.betaOgDescriptionWW: Choose your platform and submit your application.
meta.rosvpnDescriptionWW: Russian-locale add-on for Russian IP egress. Request via support; not included for all regions.

referral.title:
Invite friends —
use it for free!
referral.description: Share your code: your friends get +10 days of subscription, and you get up to a full month as a bonus. More invites, more free access!

items.q: Why is your speed so high?
items.a: We use modern protocols like WireGuard. This ensures minimum latency, reliable encryption, and a stable connection even with a weak internet signal.
We have a wide network worldwide, including locations in Europe, Asia, and Russia. The full list is available right in the app — pick any spot on the map.

items.q: Do you really not save activity logs?
items.a: Absolutely. Our No-Logs policy is part of our technical architecture. We don’t know which websites you visit. Your activity belongs only to you.
We use top-tier standards. All your traffic is securely protected before it even leaves your device. It's safe even on public Wi-Fi networks.

items.q: How can I pay for the subscription?
items.a: Using any convenient method: bank cards, payment systems, and in-app purchases. Everything is transparent, fast, and without hidden fees.

common.comingSoonMessage: We’re putting on the finishing touches! The subscription will be available very soon.
common.cookieConsentMessage: We use cookies and similar technologies to measure visits and to deliver and measure ads. You can accept or reject non-essential storage.

turkiyePage.title: Raqoon isn’t available in Türkiye right now
turkiyePage.lead: We’re truly sorry. For the time being we can’t offer Raqoon VPN to people located in Türkiye or connecting from there.
turkiyePage.closing: We hope that one day this will change — and we’ll be glad to see you again.

downloadPage.heroTitle: No cards. No email. Just your security.
downloadPage.heroText: Press the button — and you’re protected. We don’t collect your data because we have no reason to track you.
downloadPage.mythsP1: Think a VPN necessarily requires personal data? Raqoon proves otherwise: your account is completely anonymous. No links to email or cards when you start.
downloadPage.mythsP2: We don’t trade your attention. We have no annoying ads like those in "free" services. Instead, you get a 3-day honest test drive to see the quality for yourself.
features: 3 days of full access — a commitment-free test drive

downloadPage.finalText: Join the community of those who choose an internet without tracking or restrictions.

about.keyPointsBody: Qat Bilişim ve Yazılım Teknolojileri Ltd. Şti. ensures the development and support of Raqoon digital services. We prioritize process transparency, personal data protection, and customer service quality. The company operates in accordance with applicable legal requirements and internal security standards.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
Raqoon Privacy Policy
Effective Date: March 1, 2026
Jurisdiction: Ankara, Türkiye
Service Owner: Qat Bilişim ve Yazılım Teknolojileri Ltd. Şti.

Summary
We respect your right to anonymity and security. We do not see what you do online, we do not record your browsing history, and we do not store your traffic content. The system records only technical parameters (data volume and time of last connection) to ensure connection quality. We do not store your card data — all payments go through secure external gateways.

1. Zero Logs Policy
We strictly adhere to a policy of no activity logs. The Service's technical architecture excludes the possibility of recording, storing, or transferring the following data to third parties:
• Activity History: We do not record visited websites (URLs), search queries, and browsing history.
• Network Queries: We do not maintain records of DNS queries.
• Traffic Content: We have no access to the content of transmitted data, including messages, emails, and files.
• Source IP Address: We do not save your real IP address during the use of the service and do not match it with your activity.

2. Collected Data (Technical Necessity)
To ensure stable operation and subscription management, the Service processes the minimum necessary set of data.
2.1. Identification
• UUID / Access Key: A unique technical identifier for authorizing your device on our servers.
• Email (optional): Used exclusively for account access recovery or sending receipts and system notifications.
2.2. Statistics and Diagnostics
• Traffic Volume: The amount of data transmitted and received to monitor your plan's limits.
• Last Connection Time: Fixed to identify connection problems and maintain up-to-date session status.
• Subscription Status: The expiration date and activity of your access key.

3. App Performance and No-Tracking
• Marketing Trackers: Our applications completely lack third-party analysis and marketing tools (such as Facebook SDK or advertising identifiers) that could transmit information about you to third parties.
• Availability Monitoring: The application may automatically check the connection with our nodes. This data is completely anonymized and used only for the automatic selection of the fastest server.

4. Payment Information
We do not store or process the full details of your bank cards.
• Apple App Store: Transactions are processed by Apple. We receive only limited technical confirmation data needed to validate subscription status.
• Google Play: Transactions are processed by Google under Google Play Billing policies. We receive only limited technical confirmation data needed to validate subscription status.
• HUAWEI AppGallery: Transactions are processed by Huawei under AppGallery / in-app purchase rules where applicable. We receive only limited technical confirmation data needed to validate subscription status.

5. Retention Periods and Data Deletion
• Technical Information: Data on traffic and login times are stored for the duration of the subscription.
• Automatic Deletion: If you do not renew your subscription, account data may be completely removed from the system after 90 days of inactivity.
• Your Right to Delete: You can completely delete your account and all associated information at any time through the app settings or by contacting support.

6. Data Transfer and Government Requests
Qat Bilişim ve Yazılım Teknolojileri Ltd. Şti. is registered in Türkiye. We do not sell user data and do not transfer it to advertising companies. In case of receiving official requests from law enforcement agencies, we act strictly within the law. However, our architecture makes it impossible to provide data about your actions online, as this information is technically not recorded. We can only confirm the fact of having an account and the volume of consumed traffic.

7. Contacts
For privacy or data deletion inquiries:
• Email: private@raqoon.app
• Telegram: @raqoonbot
• Location: Ankara, Türkiye

8. App distribution and store operators
When you install Raqoon VPN from Google Play, HUAWEI AppGallery (AppGallery), or the Apple App Store, the respective store operator processes purchases and certain account or device identifiers under its own terms of purchase and privacy policy. We receive only the technical information required to verify your subscription and deliver the Service (for example, encrypted tokens or purchase receipts). Your use of the store is also governed by that operator’s rules.

9. Age requirement
The Service is not directed to individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

10. Regional processing
We may process and store technical data in Türkiye and in jurisdictions where our servers and subprocessors operate, limited to what is necessary to provide the Service.

11. Policy updates
We may update this Policy from time to time. Material changes will be reflected by updating the effective date at the top. Your continued use of the Service after publication of the updated Policy constitutes acceptance of the revised Policy where permitted by law.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.body:
Terms of Use (PUBLIC OFFER)
Effective Date: March 1, 2026
Place of Publication: Ankara, Türkiye
This User Agreement (hereinafter — the "Agreement") is an official offer from the Raqoon service (hereinafter — the "Provider" or "Service") to enter into a contract with any individual (hereinafter — the "User") on the terms set forth below.

1. GENERAL PROVISIONS
1.1. Use of the Raqoon application, registration on the website, or payment for Service offerings constitutes the User's full and unconditional consent to this Agreement (Acceptance).
1.2. The User guarantees that they have reached the age of 18 and possess full legal capacity to enter into this Agreement.
1.3. The Provider reserves the right to make changes to the terms of the Agreement. The new version comes into force from the moment of publication.

2. SUBJECT OF THE AGREEMENT
2.1. The Provider grants the User a non-exclusive right (License) to use the Service's software and network infrastructure for organizing a virtual private network (VPN).
2.2. Access to software:
2.2.1. Access to the Service by default is carried out exclusively through the official Raqoon application.
2.2.2. Use of third-party clients (including Hiddify, v2rayNG, and analogues) is allowed only in cases where this possibility is directly provided by the description of the Tariff Plan paid for by the User.
2.3. Device Limit:
2.3.1. The number of simultaneous connections (sessions) is determined by the conditions of the selected Tariff Plan.
2.3.2. In the absence of an indication in the Tariff, the standard limit is 5 (five) devices per account.

3. TERMS OF USE AND PROHIBITIONS
3.1. The User undertakes to use the Service only for lawful purposes.
3.2. Strictly prohibited actions:
3.2.1. Use of P2P (BitTorrent) protocols and downloading torrents on any Service servers.
3.2.2. Sending spam (including bulk email through port 25), flooding in messengers and social networks.
3.2.3. Distribution of malicious software, viruses, trojans, botnet management.
3.2.4. Any types of network attacks: port scanning, brute-force password cracking, DDoS attacks, unauthorized access to others' resources.
3.2.5. Distribution of child pornography and materials promoting terrorism or violence.
3.3. Consequences of violations: Violation of any subparagraph of clause 3.2 entails immediate account blocking without the right to restoration and without a refund of funds.

4. FAIR USE POLICY
4.1. The Service is intended for personal, non-commercial use.
4.2. For Tariff Plans of the "Unlimited" category, the following restrictions apply:
4.2.1. If the volume of consumed traffic exceeds 3 TB (Terabytes) per month;
AND
4.2.2. The Service records an abnormal load on the channel, deteriorating connection quality for other users;
4.2.3. The Provider reserves the right to unilaterally limit connection speed or suspend access until the end of the settlement period.

5. PAYMENT AND REFUND PROCEDURE
5.1. Service offerings are classified as digital content provided instantly in electronic form.
5.2. Refusal of Refund: In accordance with Article 15(ğ) of the "Regulation on Distance Contracts" (Mesafeli Sözleşmeler Yönetmeliği) of the Republic of Türkiye, the consumer's right to withdraw from the contract (refund) does not apply to services performed instantly in an electronic environment.
5.3. Platform billing (Google Play, HUAWEI AppGallery, Apple App Store): Refunds, cancellations, and billing disputes for subscriptions purchased through an official app store are regulated exclusively by that platform's rules. The Provider has no technical capability to issue refunds for such payments outside the platform's procedures.
5.4. Blocking of access to the Service caused by the actions of government bodies (internet censorship) or the User's internet providers is recognized as a force majeure circumstance and is not a basis for a refund of funds.

6. LIABILITY OF THE PARTIES
6.1. The Service is provided on an "as is" basis. The Provider does not guarantee error-free and uninterrupted operation of the Service, as well as its compatibility with the networks of specific internet providers.
6.2. The Provider is not liable for any losses, including lost profits, arising from the use or inability to use the Service.
6.3. The Provider does not guarantee uninterrupted availability of any specific third-party websites, online services, applications, or their functionality, and is not liable for inaccessibility, access restrictions, speed degradation, blocking, or other disruptions caused by circumstances beyond the Provider's reasonable control, including actions of third parties, telecom operators, resource owners/administrators, hosting/CDN providers, government restrictions, maintenance works, or outages.
6.4. No compensation, refund recalculation, or reimbursement of damages related to inaccessibility of specific websites or services shall be provided by the Provider, except where otherwise required by mandatory applicable law.

7. FINAL PROVISIONS
7.1. This Agreement is governed by the legislation of the Republic of Türkiye.
7.2. All disputes and disagreements are subject to resolution in the courts of Ankara, Türkiye.

8. DISTRIBUTION PLATFORMS AND PLATFORM BILLING
8.1. The Application may be distributed through Google Play, HUAWEI AppGallery, the Apple App Store, and other official channels we authorize.
8.2. In-app subscriptions, renewals, free trials (if offered), cancellations, and payment receipts are processed by the applicable platform operator (Google, Huawei, Apple, or another authorized store) under that platform’s terms and privacy policy, in addition to this Agreement.
8.3. The Provider does not receive or store your full bank card number from those platforms; we may receive limited technical data (such as subscription status and validation tokens) needed to activate and maintain your access.
8.4. If mandatory consumer laws in your country grant rights that cannot be waived, those rights remain unaffected to the extent required by law.

contact.title: Contacts
contact.body:
Service operator: Qat Bilişim ve Yazılım Teknolojileri Ltd. Şti., Ankara, Türkiye (registered address on the About page at raqoon.app/about).

Support (access, billing questions, technical issues): help@raqoon.app
Privacy and data deletion requests: private@raqoon.app

We aim to respond within a reasonable time on business days. For Google Play or Huawei AppGallery billing and refunds, the store’s own support channels may also apply under the platform’s rules.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.body:
Refund Policy
Effective Date: March 1, 2026

1. Google Play (Android). If you purchased or subscribed through Google Play: refunds, cancellations, renewals, free-trial conversion, and billing disputes are handled under Google Play and Google Payments policies. The Provider cannot issue or approve refunds for Google Play transactions outside those rules.

2. HUAWEI AppGallery. If you purchased or subscribed through Huawei AppGallery or Huawei in-app purchases: refunds, cancellations, and billing are governed by Huawei Consumer Business Group / AppGallery policies and the applicable regional Huawei terms. The Provider cannot issue refunds for those transactions outside Huawei’s procedures.

3. Apple App Store (iOS / macOS / Apple platforms). If the subscription is issued through the Apple App Store, refunds, subscription cancellation, and related issues are regulated exclusively by Apple’s rules.

4. Other channels. If the purchase was not made through an official app store (Google Play, AppGallery, or App Store), then in accordance with Art. 15(ğ) of the "Regulation on Distance Contracts" (Mesafeli Sözleşmeler Yönetmeliği) of the Republic of Türkiye, the digital service may not be subject to withdrawal-based refund or exchange, except where mandatory law provides otherwise.

5. How to request help. For access or subscription status issues, contact help@raqoon.app. For store-side refunds, use the purchase history and refund flow in the store account you used (Google Play, AppGallery, or Apple ID) where applicable.
